mapper.select:
SELECT u.uuid AS uid, u.username AS username, u.nickname AS nickname, r.rating AS rating, r.solved_count AS count FROM user_practice_rating r INNER JOIN user_info u ON u.uuid = r.uid
(u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchUser}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchUser}, '%'))
ORDER BY r.rating DESC, r.solved_count DESC, u.username ASC
